title: macrotyloma uniflorum var. stenocarpum
intro: Macrotyloma uniflorum var. stenocarpum, also known as horse gram or Madras gram, is a variety of the Macrotyloma uniflorum plant, which is a type of legume native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Macrotyloma uniflorum var. stenocarpum include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve digestion, and boost energy levels. In herbal preparations, Macrotyloma uniflorum var. stenocarpum is often used in the form of powder, decoction, or oil, and is commonly consumed as a supplement or used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
